title: Tweaked Redstone Torches
description: A lightweight resource pack that changes redstone torches
body:
This resource pack alters the texture of redstone torches. Instead of the normal torch texture just with a red outline, the torches now have a new texture. This change can add a unique and interesting touch to your Minecraft world, especially if you enjoy creating intricate redstone contraptions.
There are 2 versions of this resource pack, one with an outline and the other without it.

![Redstone torches powered and not, redstone block, repeater and a comparator, all in different versions (from left): NO OUTLINE, OUTLINE, VANILLA](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86f1437dab64dba70e65d087069e883039e28300.png)
